column1: Welcome to Socket City. Where everything quits working the day after the warranty expires.
column2: 歡迎來到多插座城市電器行。保固期過後一天所有東西就壞掉的地方。

column1: Thank You very much.
column2: 非常感謝你。

column1: I'm sure that you will be very happy with your purchase.
column2: 我相信你會對購買的東西非常滿意。

column1: Thanks. You will have many years of trouble free service.
column2: 謝謝。你將享受多年無故障的服務。

column1: Thank you for visiting Socket City.
column2: 感謝你蒞臨多插座城市電器行。

column1: You sure know a deal when you see one.
column2: 你真的很懂得識貨。

column1: Come and see us again, anytime.
column2: 隨時再來看我們。

column1: Thank You. Let me know how you enjoy it.
column2: 感謝。告訴我你有多享受它。

column1: Perhaps I can interest you in something else.
column2: 也許我可以推薦你別的東西？

column1: Have you seen our vacuum cleaners? They really suck!
column2: 你有看過我們的吸塵器嗎？吸力真的超強！

column1: Would you like the $200 Extended Service Contract with that?
column2: 要不要加上 $200 的延長保固契約？

column1: You'll want the $150 Factory Extension Warranty with that, right?
column2: 你想要 $150 的原廠延長保修吧？

column1: Can we interest you in the $300 1-Year Lifetime Replacement Guarantee?
column2: 要不要加上 $300 的一年終身替換保證？

column1: How about a $250 Extended Factory Service Warranty Replacement Guarantee Contract Agreement Deal with that?
column2: 要不要再加 $250 的延長原廠服務保修替換保證契約協議？

column1: If you ever require service, you know where to go!
column2: 如果你需要服務，你知道該找誰！

column1: Of course, for another $75, you could have gotten the next model up.
column2: 當然，只要再付 $75，你就能買到更新的型號。

column1: Our free installation is only $45 today!
column2: 我們今天的免費安裝只要 $45！

column1: Sorry, we only had a floor sample left, but trust me, it's in perfect condition.
column2: 抱歉，我們只剩展示品，但相信我，它狀況完美。

column1: Remember, we offer free delivery anywhere within the game!
column2: 記住，我們提供遊戲內任何地方的免費配送！

column1: Do you smell something burning? Oh, it's that cash in your pocket!
column2: 你聞到什麼燒焦的味道嗎？喔，那是你口袋裡的現金在燒！

column1: Now that didn't hurt a bit, did it?
column2: 這一點都不傷身，對吧？

column1: Notice how we ignore anybody who's browsing the under-$200 items?
column2: 注意我們怎樣對待瀏覽 $200 以下商品的人？

column1: Since you're spending, how about replacing your car stereo with an $800 Kerplunkett?
column2: 既然你在花錢，要不要用 $800 的 Kerplunkett 汽車音響？

column1: Should we call the paramedics to treat your wallet for shock?
column2: 我們需要叫救護車搶救你的錢包嗎？

column1: Care to go double-or-nothing for that 92 inch Projection TV?
column2: 要不要賭雙倍或全輸來買那台 92 吋投影電視？

column1: Now, if I can steer you towards some of our higher-margin products...
column2: 現在，如果我能引導你買一些我們利潤較高的產品…

column1: Didn't you have your eye on that complete Home Videotape Production Studio?
column2: 你不是一直看著那套完整的家庭錄影製作室嗎？

column1: If you're not completely satisfied, we'll be glad to give you partial credit.
column2: 如果你不完全滿意，我們很樂意給你部分折抵。

column1: We're members of the Bait 'n Switch(TM) Retailer's Association!
column2: 我們是「誘餌欺詐」零售商協會的成員！

column1: We finance 90 Days, Same as Bankruptcy!
column2: 我們提供 90 天分期付款，跟破產一樣！

column1: With every purchase over $5200, we're giving away free Chapter 11 Auto-Filers!
column2: 購買超過 $5200，我們送免費破產第 11 章自動申請表！

column1: Please be aware that our Extended Service Contract excludes parts and labor.
column2: 請注意我們的延長服務契約不包括零件和工資。

column1: Welcome to QT Clothing. We will sell you anything, no matter how bad it looks.
column2: 歡迎來到 Q.T 服飾店。我們什麼都賣，不管看起來多難看。

column1: Welcome to QT Clothing. Meet our tailor, Howie Fitzhugh!
column2: 歡迎來到 Q.T 服飾店。介紹我們的裁縫 Howie Fitzhugh！

column1: Welcome to QT Clothing. Our ties don't bind and our belts are a cinch.
column2: 歡迎來到 Q.T 服飾店。我們的領帶不綁、腰帶很舒服。

column1: Welcome to QT Clothing. We have legal briefs and law suits.
column2: 歡迎來到 Q.T 服飾店。我們有法律簡述和訴訟套裝。

column1: Welcome to QT Clothing, open 24 hours...we never clothes!
column2: 歡迎來到 Q.T 服飾店，24 小時營業…我們從不打烊！

column1: Welcome to QT Clothing. Thursday is Double Shoulder Pad Day!
column2: 歡迎來到 Q.T 服飾店。星期四是雙倍肩墊日！

column1: Welcome to QT Clothing. Wear our clothes and you'll be a QT, too!
column2: 歡迎來到 Q.T 服飾店。穿上我們的衣服，你也會變成 Q.T！

column1: Welcome to QT Clothing. The only place in the world where you can buy just 1 pant!
column2: 歡迎來到 Q.T 服飾店。世界上唯一可以只買 1 件褲子的地方！

column1: Welcome to QT Clothing. Try on our soothing new Medicated Tux!
column2: 歡迎來到 Q.T 服飾店。試試我們舒緩的新醫療燕尾服！

column1: My! Don't WE look nice today!
column2: 哇！我們今天看起來真漂亮！

column1: It's the real you.
column2: 這才是真正的你。

column1: Spiffy.
column2: 精美。

column1: Faaabulous!!!
column2: 太棒了！！！

column1: Our clothes are of the highest quality.
column2: 我們的衣服品質最高。

column1: Have a wonderful day!
column2: 祝你有美好的一天！

column1: Lookin' good!
column2: 看起來不錯！

column1: You can't go wong at QT.
column2: 在 Q.T 不會出錯。

column1: Perhaps you should stock up now while the prices are so reasonable.
column2: 也許你應該趁價格這麼合理時囤貨。

column1: With your figure, perhaps you should consider going to a tent maker.
column2: 以你的身材，也許你應該考慮去帳篷店。

column1: Oooh, you look good enough to eat!
column2: 唔，你看起來好吃到不行！

column1: Don't you just love the new spring fashions? Tres magnifique!
column2: 你不喜歡新春裝嗎？非常優雅！

column1: It's nice like that, just a tad tight around the bottom.
column2: 很不錯，就是下面稍微有點緊。

column1: Good choice...rayon is back in this year!
column2: 好選擇…人造絲今年又流行了！

column1: Now what are you going to do about your HAIR?
column2: 現在你要怎樣對付你的頭髮？

column1: Don't forget to accessorize!
column2: 別忘了搭配配飾！

column1: Nice! It really accentuates those pectorals.
column2: 不錯！真的突顯那些胸肌。

column1: You know, a little tummy tuck would take care of that slight pucker in back.
column2: 你知道，小腹部整形就能解決後面那點皺紋。

column1: Stop slouching and it won't crease across the torso.
column2: 停止駝背，就不會在軀幹上起褶。

column1: With a physique like yours, you could wear ANYthing!
column2: 以你的身材，你可以穿任何東西！

column1: Let me mention just two little words. Lipo. Suction.
column2: 讓我只說兩個小詞。抽脂。吸管。

column1: Welcome to Monolith Burger. Our Assistant Manager knows the Heimlich Manuever!

column1: Will that be all?
column2: 就這些嗎？

column1: Would you like fries with that?
column2: 要加薯條嗎？

column1: Something else with that?
column2: 還要別的嗎？

column1: Take some home for your family too.
column2: 帶一些回家給你的家人。

column2: 祝你愉快。

column1: Sounds delicious.
column2: 聽起來很好吃。

column1: Will that be cash or charge? Tee hee.
column2: 要付現還是刷卡？呵呵。

column2: 本週特惠：買兩個漢堡送免費奶昔！

column1: You can save 45 minutes by flushing that right now.
column2: 你現在把那個沖掉就能省 45 分鐘。
